prestazioni: 1GR-FE 4.0L V6 (3,956cc) forced induction via HKS GT-SS Supercharger Kit (8psi base boost, 350-380whp on 93 octane, paired with HKS Hi-Power SPL exhaust with 3.5" titanium-wrapped downpipes and Borla Pro XS mufflers for 30% flow increase over stock)

Full bolt-on internals upgrade: JE Pistons 2618 forged slugs (10.5:1 CR), Eagle H-beam connecting rods, ACL Race Series bearings, and ARP head studs (200,000psi tensile strength) to handle 500whp reliably with Motul 300V 10W-60 full synthetic oil

Suspension overhaul: Icon Vehicle Dynamics Stage 3 coilovers (2.5" remote reservoirs, 3-way adjustable compression/rebound, 14" travel front/12" rear) with SPC Adjustable Upper Control Arms (camber/caster correction) and Total Chaos Fabrication front long-travel kit (2.5" wider track, 4" extended wheelbase for rock crawling stability)
estetica: Rocket Bunny FJ-R widebody kit (hand-laid carbon fiber fenders, 3.5" flares, custom aluminum inner fender liners) paired with a custom 3M Matte Military Green wrap (M202) and blacked-out Toyota emblem via Vinyl Depot overlays

Front end reinforcement: C4 Fab front bumper with integrated Baja Designs Squadron Sport LED light pods (50,000 lumen output) and a custom aluminum skid plate (0.25" 5052-H32 grade) with integrated recovery points (Warn 12,000lb rated)

Interior: Full Recaro SRD-E bucket seats (fixed-back, FIA 8862-2009 certified) with Schroth Profi II 6-point harnesses, custom aluminum dash overlay (CNC-machined from 6061-T6, powder-coated satin black) housing a Motec C127 dash logger and AEM CD-7 digital gauge cluster
